defaults.format: Markdown sections: Summary, Findings, Evidence, Risks, Next Actions.
defaults.preservation_policy: Do not change meaning, severity, evidence, or uncertainty while normalizing.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Normalize this subagent output. Target format: {format}. Preservation policy: {preservation_policy}. Input: {input}
